title: syringa × hybrida
intro: Syringa × hybrida, also known as the lilac tree, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Oleaceae family, resulting from the cross between Syringa vulgaris and other Syringa species. The lilac tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Syringa × hybrida include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Herbal preparations of the lilac tree can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and essential oils, often used to calm the mind and soothe the body.
